d2s1.caption: One parking lot, three trails: Door (easy, through the gap), Window (shortest), Notch (ladder + ledge). Golden-hour light comes from behind you facing the Wall.
d2s1.svg: <svg viewBox='0 0 340 240' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'><text x='12' y='20' font-size='10' fill='#B01E24' font-weight='700'>⚠ rattlesnakes — stay on paths</text><polyline points='10,80 40,60 70,85 100,55 130,80 160,58 190,82 220,62 245,86 275,60 305,82 330,68' fill='none' stroke='#B98A56' stroke-width='3'/><text x='60' y='42' font-size='10' fill='#B98A56' font-weight='700'>THE WALL — badlands spires</text><path d='M170,178 C185,150 225,125 252,95' fill='none' stroke='#D69500' stroke-width='3' stroke-dasharray='7 5'/><text x='196' y='142' font-size='10' fill='#8A6D00'>Door Trail 1.2 km</text><text x='258' y='84' font-size='14'>📷</text><text x='236' y='110' font-size='10.5' fill='#22262A' font-weight='700'>the Door — go beyond the gap</text><path d='M150,180 C112,164 84,140 72,112' fill='none' stroke='#D69500' stroke-width='3' stroke-dasharray='7 5'/><line x1='62' y1='112' x2='78' y2='96' stroke='#5A6068' stroke-width='2'/><line x1='66' y1='116' x2='82' y2='100' stroke='#5A6068' stroke-width='2'/><text x='24' y='128' font-size='10' fill='#22262A'>log ladder</text><text x='82' y='88' font-size='12'>⭐</text><text x='96' y='92' font-size='10' fill='#22262A'>Notch ledge view</text><path d='M192,178 C205,150 212,132 215,110' fill='none' stroke='#D69500' stroke-width='2.5' stroke-dasharray='5 4'/><text x='222' y='126' font-size='10' fill='#5A6068'>Window (100 m)</text><rect x='148' y='178' width='44' height='20' rx='3' fill='#EEF2F8' stroke='#10437C' stroke-width='1.5'/><text x='163' y='192' font-size='12' fill='#10437C' font-weight='700'>🅿</text><path d='M10,212 H330' stroke='#697077' stroke-width='7' fill='none'/><text x='118' y='231' font-size='10' fill='#5A6068'>Badlands Loop Rd (Hwy 240)</text><text x='236' y='206' font-size='10' fill='#00693C' font-weight='700'>◂ you arrive (NE entrance)</text></svg>

d3s0.caption: Park in the garage, walk the Avenue of Flags to the terrace for the classic shot, then do the Presidential Trail loop counter-clockwise — closest views are under the faces; the Sculptor's Studio is on the way back.
d3s0.svg: <svg viewBox='0 0 340 240' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'><path d='M75,85 Q170,12 265,85' fill='none' stroke='#B98A56' stroke-width='3'/><circle cx='125' cy='52' r='10' fill='#D9C4A3' stroke='#B98A56' stroke-width='2'/><circle cx='155' cy='44' r='10' fill='#D9C4A3' stroke='#B98A56' stroke-width='2'/><circle cx='185' cy='44' r='10' fill='#D9C4A3' stroke='#B98A56' stroke-width='2'/><circle cx='215' cy='52' r='10' fill='#D9C4A3' stroke='#B98A56' stroke-width='2'/><text x='94' y='26' font-size='9.5' fill='#5A6068'>Washington · Jefferson · Roosevelt · Lincoln</text><path d='M138,116 C100,108 92,92 118,74 M202,116 C240,110 252,96 236,80 M118,74 L138,68 M236,80 L216,72' fill='none' stroke='#D69500' stroke-width='3' stroke-dasharray='7 5'/><text fill='#fff' stroke='#23272B' stroke-width='1.5'/><text x='240' y='149' font-size='10' fill='#22262A'>Sculptor's Studio ⭐</text><rect x='140' y='112' width='60' height='14' rx='2' fill='#fff' d3s1.caption: Drive the 29-km loop clockwise from the State Game Lodge end. Bison decide where bison are; the burros usually hold the southern stretch, prairie dogs the west.
d3s1.svg: <svg viewBox='0 0 340 240' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'><path d='M170,42 C272,48 300,116 252,178 C204,228 112,222 80,172 C46,120 74,50 170,42 Z' fill='none' stroke='#697077' stroke-width='6'/><rect x='150' y='24' width='40' height='16' rx='2' fill='#fff' stroke='#23272B' stroke-width='1.5'/><text x='198' y='36' font-size='10' fill='#00693C' font-weight='700'>start — State Game Lodge ▸</text><text x='286' y='104' font-size='11' fill='#5A6068'>▾</text><text x='96' y='214' font-size='11' fill='#5A6068'>◂</text><text x='52' y='84' font-size='11' fill='#5A6068'>▴</text><text x='120' y='122' font-size='12' fill='#B01E24' font-weight='700'>🦬 bison — anywhere,</text><text x='132' y='136' font-size='12' fill='#B01E24' font-weight='700'>stay in the truck</text><text x='142' y='196' font-size='12'>⭐</text><text x='120' y='210' font-size='10' fill='#22262A'>begging burros zone</text><circle cx='72' cy='142' r='2' fill='#B98A56'/><circle cx='80' cy='148' r='2' fill='#B98A56'/><circle cx='68' cy='152' r='2' fill='#B98A56'/><text x='14' y='168' font-size='10' fill='#22262A'>prairie dog town</text><text x='224' y='196' font-size='10' fill='#5A6068'>drive clockwise · windows down</text></svg>

d4s0.caption: Park at the visitor center, walk the paved loop either way. The classic photo angle is the southwest corner; prayer bundles hang on the northeast side — look, don't touch.
d4s0.svg: <svg viewBox='0 0 340 240' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'><text x='120' y='22' font-size='10' fill='#5A6068'>spot climbers for scale</text><circle cx='175' cy='110' r='26' fill='#D9C4A3' stroke='#B98A56' stroke-width='2.5'/><line x1='165' y1='88' x2='165' y2='132' stroke='#B98A56' stroke-width='1.5'/><line x1='175' y1='85' x2='175' y2='135' stroke='#B98A56' stroke-width='1.5'/><line x1='185' y1='88' x2='185' y2='132' stroke='#B98A56' stroke-width='1.5'/><circle cx='175' cy='110' r='48' fill='none' stroke='#D69500' stroke-width='3' stroke-dasharray='7 5'/><text x='210' y='150' font-size='10' fill='#8A6D00'>Tower Trail 2 km loop</text><text x='236' y='66' font-size='10' fill='#5A6068'>prayer bundles —</text><text x='236' y='78' font-size='10' fill='#5A6068'>please do not touch</text><text x='108' y='158' font-size='14'>📷</text><text x='42' y='172' font-size='10' fill='#B01E24' font-weight='700'>classic angle (SW)</text><circle cx='158' cy='176' r='2' fill='#9AA1A8'/><circle cx='168' cy='182' r='2.5' fill='#9AA1A8'/><circle cx='180' cy='177' r='2' fill='#9AA1A8'/><circle cx='190' cy='183' r='2.5' fill='#9AA1A8'/><text x='200' y='186' font-size='9.5' fill='#5A6068'>boulder field</text><rect x='56' y='192' width='52' height='20' rx='3' fill='#EEF2F8' stroke='#10437C' stroke-width='1.5'/><text x='64' y='206' font-size='11' fill='#10437C' font-weight='700'>🅿 + VC</text><path d='M96,190 C112,176 122,164 132,152' fill='none' stroke='#D69500' stroke-width='2.5' stroke-dasharray='5 4'/><path d='M110,214 C180,220 250,216 320,222' fill='none' stroke='#697077' stroke-width='5'/><text x='210' y='236' font-size='10' fill='#5A6068'>entrance rd — prairie dog town both sides</text></svg>
